creator: jeh@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port doesn't build properly.  Please fix and test, see the
porters-handbook.

make install
make package
make deinstall
pkg_add ...     <=== this is failing.
make deinstall
make reinstall
make package

Jim

dumb users in front of smart terminals.
